summary: Complete testing of Star Citizen Fleet Manager - Loadout Builder with SIZE RESTRICTIONS feature. All 11 requested features verified working. Backend: 33/33 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows working including the new size restriction enforcement.

issues: React key warning: Duplicate ship IDs from live API (eclipse, idris-p, carrack, etc.) causing 'Encountered two children with the same key' warnings - cosmetic only, functionality works

passed_tests: Login flow: email=test@test.com, token=testtoken123 works correctly via data-testid selectors
Loadout Builder navigation: /loadout via nav link works
Loadout Builder ship selection: Grid shows ships with search input (data-testid=ship-search-input)
Loadout Builder slot info badges: Shows '3x wpn' and 'S1 shld' badges on ship cards
Loadout Builder Gladius selection: Select via data-testid=select-ship-gladius
Gladius slots verified: Shield S1, Power Plant S1, Cooler S1, QD S1, 3 weapon hardpoints (Max S2, S1, S1)
SIZE RESTRICTION (Weapons): Weapon Hardpoint 1 (Max S2) - modal shows 'Only weapons size 2 or smaller', 74 weapons shown (S1+S2 only), NO S3+ weapons visible
SIZE RESTRICTION (Components): Shield S1 - modal shows 'Only size 1 Shield components', 24 shields shown (all S1), exact match enforcement works
Equip weapon: 10-Series Greatsword Cannon equipped, shows name and price (22,287 aUEC), total cost displayed
Compare page: Navigation via nav link works, add ships via modal with search, 2 ships compared (Eclipse, Gladius)
Compare table: Shows all spec rows - Manufacturer, Size Class, Role, Crew (min-max format), Cargo, Length, Beam, Height, Mass, SCM Speed, Boost Speed with stat bars
Ships page: 276 ships from LIVE API, 97 with images, crew format shows 'min-max' (e.g., 1-1)
Components page: Size filter works, 115 Size 1 components, shows real locations (Platinum HUR-L3) and prices (17,100 aUEC)
Weapons page: Size filter works, 37 Size 2 weapons, shows real locations (CenterMass Area 18) and prices (22,287 aUEC)
Auth persistence: After login, direct navigation to /loadout works (not redirected to login)
action_items: MINOR: Fix duplicate React keys - Live API returns ships with duplicate IDs (eclipse, idris-p, carrack variants). Add unique suffix to key prop in ship lists
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate ship IDs from live API cause React key warnings but don't break functionality - should generate unique keys using index fallback
LoadoutBuilder properly enforces size restrictions: weapons use <= maxSize, components use exact size match
context_for_next_testing_agent: SIZE RESTRICTION feature fully working. LoadoutBuilder at /loadout shows ships with hardpoint badges (3x wpn, S1 shld). Selecting a ship shows all slots with size constraints. Weapon slots use MAX size (allows smaller), component slots use EXACT size match. Modal headers clearly show 'Max Size X' for weapons and 'Only size X' for components. Total cost tracked. Compare page supports up to 5 ships with stat bar comparisons.

size_restriction_verification.weapon_slots: Shows weapons <= maxSize (e.g., Max S2 shows S1 and S2 weapons only)
size_restriction_verification.component_slots: Shows components with exact size match (e.g., S1 slot shows only S1 shields/coolers/etc)
